description: You are a Warning Coordination Meteorologist at a National Weather Service forecast office. Clean and format the May 2013 Moore Tornado Service Assessment draft located at /home/ga/Documents/moore_assessment_draft.odt according to the guidelines in /home/ga/Desktop/nws_report_guidelines.txt. Requirements include removing internal draft notes, applying structural heading hierarchies, creating a formatted damage summary table, inserting a Table of Contents, and applying professional document styling. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/moore_assessment_draft.odt. The file is already open in Calligra Words.

body_alignment_samples: On the afternoon of May 20, 2013, a devastating EF5 tornado struck
The synoptic environment on May 20 featured a potent upper-level trough
The NWS Norman Forecast Office issued a Tornado Warning for Moore
The tornado caused complete destruction of Briarwood Elementary School
metadata.title_text: Service Assessment: May 20, 2013 Moore, Oklahoma Tornado
metadata.source: Based on NOAA/NWS May 2013 Moore Tornado Service Assessment
